  "stats": "Speed: 15cm\nTurn: 45°\nShield: -\nArmour: 5+\nSpores: 4\nBase: 32mm\n\nEvery Dorsal weapon counts as Thorax!\n\n• Hive ships are large and cumbersome, and hence may not use Come to New Heading special orders.\n• Any ship attempting to fire upon a hive ship suffers -1 Ld when attempting to ignore closer targets if a squadron containing only Escort Drones is in base contact with the hive ship as well as in between the hive ship and the firing vessel.",
